original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Ella, Ethan, Owen, and Emily. Ella noted, "Emily is a knight or Owen is a knight". Ethan said that Owen is a knight or Ella is a knight. As Owen put it, "Owen is a knight if and only if Ella is a knave". Emily commented, "Ethan is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
